props.name: particleCount
props.description: Number of bubble particles per transition.

props.name: particleDistances
props.description: Outer and inner distances of bubble spread.

props.name: particleR
props.description: Radius factor influencing random particle rotation.

props.name: timeVariance
props.description: Random time variance (ms) for particle animations.

props.name: colors
props.description: Color indices used when creating bubble particles.

props.name: initialActiveIndex
props.description: Which item is selected on mount.
